channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for an Able Seaman, Backhoe Dredger Operator, Backhoe Dredger Engineer, and Cook for a dredging vessel. This is an offshore position. Interested candidates should follow the provided link to submit their resume.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman Dredger Operator Jobs - Dredging Vessel at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Falmouth
Description:

Two Able Seamen are required for a MOD Support vessel. The role offers a day rate of £180.00 with 4-week rotations. Joining is in Falmouth, starting as soon as possible. Essential requirement is UK right to work. Shore-side accommodation is provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman Job - MOD Support Vessel at Seamariner Limited

item.description:
Location: UK
Description:

An Ordinary Seaman is required for a geotechnical vessel joining on 17.08 for a 4 weeks (+/- 1 week) contract. The position is based in the UK. Candidates must hold a valid UK RTW or UK FWP if not UK nationals, along with CoP, STCWs, Seafarers Medical, Drugs & Alcohol test, Passport, Seamans Book, 2 recent appraisals, and a Marlins Test if not a UK National.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ordinary Seaman Job - Geotechnical Vessel at etpm Ltd

item.description:
Location: Bahrain
Description:

An Able Seaman with engine department experience is sought for a role in Bahrain. This position requires individuals to serve as mechanics. Further details regarding vessel type, contract duration, and joining date are available via the application link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman Engine Job in Bahrain at Muharraq Governorate jobs, Bahrain

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking an Able Seaman (AB) or Oiler with at least two years of tanker experience for an oil/chemical tanker position. Immediate embarkation is required. Candidates with good English communication skills are preferred. Experience on vessels between 6000-9000 DWT is a plus.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB or Oiler Job on Oil/Chemical Tanker at NorteMare LLC

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Ordinary Seaman (OS) position is open for individuals to assist with deck operations and general ship maintenance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ordinary Seaman (OS) Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Able Seaman (AB) is required to perform various deck duties, including navigation and maintenance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman (AB) Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Bosun position is available, responsible for supervising deck crew and maintaining deck equipment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Bosun Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location: Kamchatka
Description:

A fishing company is seeking processing crew members for its fleet operating out of Kamchatka. This role offers a monthly income ranging from 180,000 to 220,000 RUB, with contracts typically lasting 4-5 months. The company provides a social package including travel and paid leave. Applicants must possess the necessary documents and undergo medical examinations. Interested individuals can find more information and apply via the provided contact details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Matros Job on Fishing Vessels at Okeanrybflot JSC

item.description:
Location: Oman
Description:

Oman · Ro‑Ro · 5 months · Russian crew · Joining 24 July

We are seeking an Able Seaman (qualified or watchkeeping) for m/v TRANSIT SEDANKA (1996, Sierra Leone flag, AKASAKA 6UEC45LA main engine, 5295 kW). The vessel is a Ro‑Ro with 18 Russian crew members. Contract is 5 months. Joining will take place in Oman between 14 and 24 July. Salary: 153,000 RUB net per month + additional pay for lashing operations. All payments are made in RUB twice a month to the seafarer’s account. Medical examination is covered by the employer. Candidates from any region of Russia are welcome.

Key responsibilities:

- Mooring and unmooring operations
– Cargo securing and lashing
– Deck maintenance and cleaning
– Watchkeeping duties as directed
– Assisting in emergency drills

Essential requirements:

- Valid AB certificate (qual. or watchkeeping)
– Experience on Ro‑Ro vessels is an advantage
– Good command of English
– All valid STCW certificates and medical

What we offer:

- Competitive net salary + extra pay for lashing
– Payments twice a month
– Employer-paid medical examination
– Opportunity for Russian seafarers from any region



Apply to this job
item.title: [Job] Able Seaman (Qualified / Watchkeeping) – Ro‑Ro Vessel at Transit
